Format.name: UCPTearthPos_TimeZone#SI
Format.spec: text( ("%d %d ", EarthPos.latitude_direction, EarthPos.longitude_direction),( (EarthPos.latitude_direction == 0) ? ("S") : ("N") ),(" %d %f ", EarthPos.latitude_deg, EarthPos.latitude_min),( (EarthPos.longitude_direction == 0) ? ("E") : ("W") ),(" %d %f %f %d ", EarthPos.longitude_deg, EarthPos.longitude_min,EarthPos.height_above_sea,TimeZone) )

Format.name: UCPTearthPos_TimeZone#US
Format.spec: text( ("%d %d ", EarthPos.latitude_direction, EarthPos.longitude_direction),( (EarthPos.latitude_direction == 0) ? ("S") : ("N") ),(" %d %f ", EarthPos.latitude_deg, EarthPos.latitude_min),( (EarthPos.longitude_direction == 0) ? ("E") : ("W") ),(" %d %f %f %d", EarthPos.longitude_deg, EarthPos.longitude_min,EarthPos.height_above_sea*3.28084+0(0:840),TimeZone) )

Strings.String: This file is Distech Controls' manufacturer-specific type file, containing User Network Variable Types (UNVTs), User Configuration Property Types (UCPTs) and the enumeration types that support them.
This file was created and is maintained by Distech Controls Inc., Canada. Contact us at 1-450-444-9898, or at www.distech-controls.com on the Internet.
This file is Distech Controls' manufacturer-specific FPT file, containing User Functional Profile Templates.
This file was created and is maintained by Distech Controls Inc., Canada. Contact us at 1-450-444-9898, or at www.distech-controls.com on the Internet.
This file is Distech Controls' manufacturer-specific, language-dependent resource file, containing LonWorks device resource strings in English localized for the United States of America.
This file was created and is maintained by Distech Controls Inc., Canada. Contact us at 1-450-444-9898, or at www.distech-controls.com on the Internet.
Reverse the action of the PID loop.
Time it takes the damper to make its full course.
Minimum time elapsed before switching between heat and cool modes.
Minimum time elapsed before switching between Free cooling and Mechanical cooling.
Minimum period a cooling stage should stay off.
Minimum period a cooling stage should stay on.
Minimum period elapsed before switching between on and off state of heating stages.
Select between duct & perimeter heating to heat first.
Maximum outside temperature allowed for free cooling (if controller can't compute enthalpy).
Minimum outside temperature allowed for mechanical cooling.
Parameters: Type, Range and Offset for each of 4 inputs
Time it takes the heating valve to make its full course.
Fan Always On In Occupied Mode
If set to true, the fan will always be On in occupied mode. If not, it will be On only if needed.
Time before going into alarm for the space temperature.
Time before going into alarm for the flow.
Time before going into alarm for the CO2 concentration.
Time it takes the cooling valve to make its full course.
Time before going into alarm for the supply temperature.
Fan time before going into alarm
Minimum period the fan should stay on or off.
Parameters: Proportional Gain, Integral Gain, Integral Time, Derivative Gain, Derivative Time, Dead Band, Bias and Reverse Action.
Ability of the damper to directly position itself so that the flow be equal to its setpoint.
Minimum position of the heating valve when there is a heating demand.
Minimum position of the cooling valve when there is a cooling demand.
Used when a modulating fan output is assigned.
Minimum Valve On and Off Period
Minimum period elapsed before switching between the valve on and off state.
Pump time before going into alarm
